actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Lewis Hamilton will start from pole and win the Canadian Grand Prix.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The eggs of a pair of Monty and Glesni, which have previously produced four eggs in the last three years, have been spotted at the Cors Dyfi nature reserve near Machynlleth in Powys on 25 April.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Hylton has joined Luton on a two-year contract and is the club's top scorer this season.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: O'Sullivan won 6-4 against Norwegian world number 42 Michael Holt, finishing with a 101 break.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: He will now face Michael Holt,

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 43-year-old man was found at a house in Shirley Terrace, Gomersal, on Friday at about 18:30 GMT.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The victim was walking along Bridgefoot Street in the south west inner city at about 16.10 local time on Friday when a gunman approached him.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Essex are named in the team - who have not won yet this season - despite suffering an arm injury in Bristol, while Craig Meschede returns.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Alex Henshall, 22, who played for Ipswich Town, was caught on Commercial Road, Ipswich, The Kilmarnock winger, who played for England's youth team, was also given six penalty points by magistrates.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Ashurst, 24, has made 17 league appearances for Iestyn Harris's side this season and joins Craig Hall and Mickael Simon in James Webster's squad for next term.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: IG Doors is building a new 18,000 sq m (193,750 sq ft) manufacturing facility in Oakdale, Caerphilly county.
